metadata.title: AI, Crypto Anxiety Creates Volatile Week for Markets
metadata.description: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde discusses the wild ride markets have been on as AI and crypto anxiety hit investors. Plus, OpenAI is teaming up with Foxconn to design AI data center hardware in the US. And Cerebras CEO Andrew Feldman shares his thoughts on the US approval for advanced AI chips to be sold to the Middle East. (Source: Bloomberg)
